reviews.comment:
De terror ya me paso  2veces cada vez que uno quiere cargar nafta ypf con la aplicacion de ypf en el aca de san clemente si no sos cliente te dicen que no funciona el servicio de aplicación. Gran mafia del aca  ....NO CARGUEN NAFTA EN EL ACA .

(Translated by Google)
It's awful! It's happened to me twice now. Every time you try to fill up at the YPF gas station in San Clemente using the YPF app, if you're not a customer, they tell you the app service doesn't work. ACA is a total racket... DON'T FILL UP AT THE ACA.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCNnNhRnRRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Aun siendo socio del ACA, lloviendo, teniendo mi identificación de Discapacitado en el parabrisas y estando el vehículo de servicio en el lugar. Me negaron cambiar una cubierta que estaba totalmente en llanta y terminé  teniendo que romperla por buscar una gomeria.  Estoy decidido a borrarme del ACA y cambiar mi seguro también. Espero que alguien lea este mensaje. Yo conocí el ACA cuando señores como Caimán y Mármolejo eran sus dirigentes. Acá en San Clemente dejó mucho de lado el servicio que sabían ofrecer

(Translated by Google)
Even though I'm an ACA member, it was raining, I had my Disabled Person's ID on the windshield, and the service vehicle was on site. They refused to change a tire that was completely flat, and I ended up having to puncture it to find a tire shop. I'm determined to cancel my ACA membership and change my insurance as well. I hope someone reads this message. I knew the ACA when people like Caimán and Mármolejo were in charge. Here in San Clemente, they've really let down the service they used to offer.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCa00tX0tREAE
